summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Nuku Creative agency website. All core features working perfectly including navigation, contact form, animations, and responsive design.

minor_issues.issue: Email link in contact section not found with expected data-testid
minor_issues.impact: Email link functionality may be present but not properly tagged for testing

passed_tests: Header navigation with all links working
Hero section with CTAs and smooth scroll
Why Nuku Creative section with 4 bento cards
Portfolio section with hover effects on all 4 items
About section with content and studio image
Contact form submission showing success message
Smooth scroll navigation to all sections
Responsive design working on desktop, tablet, and mobile
Portfolio hover effects working on all items
